title: Bob Crane
compiled_truth: Bob Crane is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (1999-05-05 to 2002-02-25), Bob Crane sent 8 and received 441 emails, totalling 449 interactions. Top correspondents: [Tana Jones](people/tana-jones) (2), [Tanya Rohauer](people/tanya-rohauer) (2), [John Lavorato](people/john-lavorato) (2), [Sara Shackleton](people/sara-shackleton) (2), [J Kaminski](people/j-kaminski) (1).
